Mailgun Mailer ============== Provides Mailgun integration for Symfony Mailer. Configuration example: ```env # SMTP MAILER_DSN=mailgun+smtp://USERNAME:PASSWORD@default?region=REGION # HTTP MAILER_DSN=mailgun+https://KEY:DOMAIN@default?region=REGION # API MAILER_DSN=mailgun+api://KEY:DOMAIN@default?region=REGION ``` where: - `KEY` is your Mailgun API key - `DOMAIN` is your Mailgun sending domain - `REGION` is Mailgun selected region (optional) Resources --------- * [Contributing](https://symfony.com/doc/current/contributing/index.html) * [Report issues](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/issues) and [send Pull Requests](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/pulls) in the [main Symfony repository](https://github.com/symfony/symfony)
